HGSS.467.0000:
A long time ago, this cool boy rode my
Bike around, and that started this\r
entire Bike boom.\f
Then I decided to open a branch at
Goldenrod City.\f
And they started selling like the wind!\f
But no one comes to this shop anymore
because of that.\f
All I have left here is a bicycle pump...\f
Should I start selling inflatable tubes?
